name: Hall with threadbare Carpeting on the floor
description: I'm in a Hall with threadbare Carpeting on the floor
hints: Ground floor hallway hub with four exits.
NORTH to upper hall. SOUTH to The Lizard's office. EAST to elevator. WEST to office.
NORTH to room 35. SOUTH to room 1 (Lizard). EAST to elevator waiting room (room 5). WEST to office with crib/sand (room 4).
notes: Starting room. Ground floor hub. N to room 35, S to room 1, E to room 5, W to room 4.
